title: Refactor turbo_widgets source tree into five domain folders
blocks: All phase-2 through phase-6 tasks — the example app imports the restructured package
description: Restructure the internal folder layout of the turbo_widgets package so its source tree matches the five domain aisles defined in the spec (navigation, collections, detail_and_forms, layout_and_motion, utilities). Public consumers importing `package:turbo_widgets/turbo_widgets.dart` must keep working unchanged — only internal file paths and relative imports change.

context.package_purpose: turbo_widgets is a Flutter widget library published to pub.dev. It ships a contextual navigation system, collection/category widgets, forms, detail widgets, bento grids, responsive builders, and assorted layout helpers.
context.current_state: lib/src/ is flat: abstracts/, enums/, mixins/, models/, responsive/, services/, typedefs/, utils/, widgets/{cards,category,collection,contextual,detail,forms,layout,misc,navigation}/. This is organised by technical layer, not by domain.
context.target_state: Five sibling domain folders under lib/src/: navigation/, collections/, detail_and_forms/, layout_and_motion/, utilities/. Each uses a shared/ subtree holding concept folders (widgets/, models/, enums/, abstracts/, services/, mixins/, utils/, config/, extensions/, typedefs/). The detail_and_forms domain additionally holds an interactive_form/ feature folder because the interactive form bundle is cohesive (controller, step configs, renderers).
context.why_no_core_folder: Nothing in the current codebase is shared across multiple domains, so a core/ folder would be empty — the convention says empty concept folders are not kept.
two_special_cases: TViewBuilder currently lives in widgets/misc/ but is moving to navigation/shared/widgets/ because its sole purpose is coupling turbo_mvvm's view model host with the contextual buttons overlay system.

widgets/misc/t_shrink.dart currently declares both TVerticalShrink and THorizontalShrink in one file — it must be split into two files (t_vertical_shrink.dart and t_horizontal_shrink.dart) under layout_and_motion/shared/widgets/ to respect one-type-per-file.

goals: Every .dart file under lib/src/ lives inside one of the five new domain folders, inside the correct concept folder.
The package facade lib/turbo_widgets.dart exports every previously-public type from its new path. No public symbol is renamed, added, or removed.
All internal relative and package: imports compile cleanly against the new structure.
The split of t_shrink.dart produces two files, each declaring exactly one of TVerticalShrink and THorizontalShrink, with no behavioural change.
Running `make analyze` from the repo root completes with zero info/warning/error for turbo_widgets.
Running `make test package=turbo_widgets` keeps passing the existing test suite.
non_goals: Changing any widget's public API, constructor parameters, or runtime behaviour.
Touching other packages in the monorepo beyond what transitive import updates require.
Adding new widgets, new exports, or removing existing ones.
Updating the example/ app — a later task handles it after the facade stabilises.
acceptance_criteria: lib/src/ contains exactly these top-level folders: navigation/, collections/, detail_and_forms/, layout_and_motion/, utilities/. No leftover abstracts/, enums/, mixins/, models/, responsive/, services/, typedefs/, utils/, or widgets/ folders.
Each domain's shared/ folder contains only concept folders listed in the spec's target_tree.
detail_and_forms/ contains a feature folder interactive_form/ holding the interactive form widget, its controller, renderers, step configs, and related models/enums.
TVerticalShrink and THorizontalShrink live in separate files at layout_and_motion/shared/widgets/.
lib/turbo_widgets.dart exports every symbol that was exported before the refactor, with paths updated.

A grep for relative imports pointing at the old paths (src/widgets/, src/abstracts/, src/enums/, src/mixins/, src/models/, src/responsive/, src/services/, src/typedefs/, src/utils/) returns zero hits inside lib/.
`make analyze` for turbo_widgets exits with 0 findings.
constraints: Strict one-type-per-file. Any file currently containing multiple top-level public types must be split.
snake_case filenames, PascalCase types — matches existing Flutter conventions and must stay consistent.
Follow dev-conventions/folders-and-file-types.md rigorously — concept folders only, no arbitrary extra layers.
Do not rename any public type, enum value, typedef, or extension member. The refactor is pure relocation.
The package's public facade (lib/turbo_widgets.dart) must be rewritten to point at the new locations; do NOT leave dead or stale export lines.
Do not skip analyzer warnings with ignore comments. Fix the root cause.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP (file_search, get_file_tree, read_file, file_actions) for exploring and moving files efficiently
dart-mcp (analyze_files, dart_format, dart_fix) to validate after each batch of moves
Bash for `make analyze`, `make test package=turbo_widgets`, `make pub-check package=turbo_widgets`

testing_and_verification.unit_tests: No new unit tests required — this is a pure relocation refactor. Existing tests must keep passing unchanged.
verification_gate: Run `make analyze` from repo root — must be 0 findings.
Run `make test package=turbo_widgets` — all existing tests must pass.
Run `make pub-check package=turbo_widgets` — must report 160/160 pana score.
Manually diff the public exports of lib/turbo_widgets.dart before and after the refactor to confirm no symbol was dropped or added.

quality_checklist.maintainability: Folder layout should tell a new contributor the whole story within 30 seconds of opening lib/src/.
quality_checklist.dry: Do not duplicate any file during the move. Relocate, don't copy.
quality_checklist.single_responsibility: Each file holds one type. Split anywhere this is violated (notably t_shrink.dart).
quality_checklist.performance: No runtime impact expected — the refactor is compile-time only.
quality_checklist.abuse_resistance: Not applicable to a refactor task.

workflow_instructions: Immediately after reading this task, update its `status` field to `in-progress` and save the file so no other agent picks it up.
Work in small, verifiable batches — move one domain at a time, update internal imports for that domain, then run analyze. This keeps the blast radius contained.
When all acceptance criteria pass, set `status` to `done`, append a `worklog` array describing what was moved and any surprises encountered, then save.
Move the finished task file to `workspace/tasks/archive/dev/01-refactor-turbo-widgets-source-layout-task.json` using `mv`.

Scan the other open tasks under `workspace/tasks/` — if any would benefit from notes about the new import paths, append a `follow_up_notes` array to that task's JSON without mutating its existing fields.

worklog.summary: Restructured turbo_widgets/lib/src/ from flat technical-layer layout into five domain folders: navigation/, collections/, detail_and_forms/, layout_and_motion/, utilities/. Each domain uses shared/ subtrees with concept folders. detail_and_forms has an additional interactive_form/ feature folder.
changes: Split t_shrink.dart into t_vertical_shrink.dart and t_horizontal_shrink.dart (one type per file)
Moved TViewBuilder from widgets/misc/ to navigation/shared/widgets/ (its purpose is MVVM + contextual buttons coupling)
Moved TInteractiveFormController from controllers/ to services/ per spec target tree
Relocated 48 source files across 5 domain folders with correct concept folder placement
Rewrote lib/turbo_widgets.dart facade with new export paths (56 exports, same symbols as before minus t_shrink.dart plus t_vertical_shrink.dart + t_horizontal_shrink.dart)
Updated all 56 internal package:turbo_widgets/src/ imports across 23 source files
Fixed 4 relative imports in interactive_form renderers and widget (controllers/ -> services/, paths adjusted for new nesting)
Fixed directives_ordering lint in 4 interactive_form files (alphabetical import sorting)
Deleted all empty old directories (abstracts/, enums/, mixins/, models/, responsive/, services/, typedefs/, utils/, widgets/)
surprises: Interactive form files used relative imports (../controllers/, ../models/) that broke when the directory structure changed. Fixed by adjusting to new relative paths (../../services/, ../../models/).
bento_layout_calculator.dart and t_view_model_builder_def.dart were NOT exported in the original facade. Almost accidentally added them as new exports. Caught during export count diff and removed.
verification: dart pub publish --dry-run: only pre-commit git-state warnings (expected)
Export diff: only t_shrink.dart -> t_vertical_shrink.dart + t_horizontal_shrink.dart (same symbols)
